texto: Become the person of no rank. Become the noble soul, and live in this awakened way, not imitating anyone. Whatever the circumstances your life asks of you, respond to them in your own individual Zen-spirited way. Don't waste any time trying to be someone else...We are not here to have someone else's experience. We are here to have our own vivid experience. So please don't cling to yesterday, to what happened, to what didn't happen. And do not judge today by yesterday. Let us just live today to the fullest! Moment after moment, each sitting is the only sitting.
explicacao: Citação de Maurine Stuart sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Become the person of no rank. Become the noble soul, and live in this awakened way, not imitating…” articula tempo, enlightenment, living em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como living e meditation.
